title: Shiv Mandir, Ambarnath
tagline: Shiv Mandir, Ambarnath — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: The Shiv Mandir of Ambarnath is a historic 11th-century Hindu temple, at Ambarnath near Mumbai, in Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: The Shiv Mandir of Ambarnath is a historic 11th-century Hindu temple, at Ambarnath near Mumbai, in Maharashtra, India. It is also known as the Ambreshwar Shiva Temple, and known locally as Puratana Shivalaya. It is situated on the bank of the Waldhuni river, 2 km away from Ambarnath railway station (East). The temple was built in 1060 AD carved in stone.

topPlaces.name: Ambarnath
topPlaces.description: Ambarnath (Marathi pronunciation: [əmbəɾnaːt̪ʰ]) is an eastern suburban city in Thane district of Maharashtra and is a part of the Mumbai Metropolitan Region.

topPlaces.name: Ulhasnagar
topPlaces.description: Ulhasnagar is a city located 26 km from Thane City in Thane district, Maharashtra, India. This city is a part of the Mumbai Metropolitan Region managed by the MMRDA. It had an estimated population of 506,098 at the 2011 Census.

topPlaces.name: Vithalwadi
topPlaces.description: Vithalwadi is a town in the Taluka of Kalyan Thane district. Vithalwadi is between Kalyan and Ulhasnagar.

topPlaces.name: Nandiwali Tarf Pachanand
topPlaces.description: Nandiwali Tarf Pachanand is a village in Kalyan Taluka, Thane District, Maharashtra, India. It is located near the western coast of India, about 14 kilometres east of the district capital Thane, and 3 kilometres south of the taluka capital Kalyan.

topPlaces.name: Kalyan Airstrip
topPlaces.description: Kalyan Airstrip was located at Nevali village, 6 km (3.7 mi) south of Kalyan railway station and 55 km (34 mi) north of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport. It was the primary landing ground for the nearby city of Bombay (now Mumbai) as early as 1920, much before the airfields of Juhu and RAF Santa Cruz were established.[2] As a Royal Air Force station during World War II in British India, the airfield served as RAF Kalyan from 1942 to 1947 and was abandoned after the war.

topPlaces.name: Shahad
topPlaces.description: Shahad is a town in the Thane district in Maharashtra state in India. It is located 60 km from Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Pisawali
topPlaces.description: Pisawali, also known as Pisavli, is a village in Kalyan taluka of Thane district, in the Maharashtra state of India. It is situated on the outskirts of the city Kalyan, about 3 kilometres south of the city center.

topPlaces.name: Kalyan-Dombivli
topPlaces.description: Kalyan-Dombivli is a twin city and it comes under Mumbai Metropolitan Region and it is a municipal corporation with its headquarters located in Kalyan in Thane district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It was formed in 1982 to administer the twin townships of Kalyan and Dombivli.

items.note: Ambarnath (Marathi pronunciation: [əmbəɾnaːt̪ʰ]) is an eastern suburban city in Thane district of Maharashtra and is a part of the Mumbai Metropolitan Region.

Ulhasnagar is a city located 26 km from Thane City in Thane district, Maharashtra, India. This city is a part of the Mumbai Metropolitan Region managed by the MMRDA. It had an estimated population of 506,098 at the 2011 Census.
Vithalwadi is a town in the Taluka of Kalyan Thane district. Vithalwadi is between Kalyan and Ulhasnagar.

Nandiwali Tarf Pachanand is a village in Kalyan Taluka, Thane District, Maharashtra, India. It is located near the western coast of India, about 14 kilometres east of the district capital Thane, and 3 kilometres south of the taluka capital Kalyan.

Kalyan Airstrip was located at Nevali village, 6 km (3.7 mi) south of Kalyan railway station and 55 km (34 mi) north of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport. It was the primary landing ground for the nearby city of Bombay (now Mumbai) as early as 1920, much before the airfields of Juhu and RAF Santa Cruz were established.[2] As a Royal Air Force station during World War II in British India, the airfield served as RAF Kalyan from 1942 to 1947 and was abandoned after the war.
Shahad is a town in the Thane district in Maharashtra state in India. It is located 60 km from Mumbai.

Pisawali, also known as Pisavli, is a village in Kalyan taluka of Thane district, in the Maharashtra state of India. It is situated on the outskirts of the city Kalyan, about 3 kilometres south of the city center.

Kalyan-Dombivli is a twin city and it comes under Mumbai Metropolitan Region and it is a municipal corporation with its headquarters located in Kalyan in Thane district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It was formed in 1982 to administer the twin townships of Kalyan and Dombivli.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shiv Mandir, Ambarnath?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shiv Mandir, Ambarnath is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shiv Mandir, Ambarnath?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (35 km) and the nearest railway station is Kalyan Junction (Mumbai) (7 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shiv Mandir, Ambarnath?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shiv Mandir, Ambarnath at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shiv Mandir, Ambarnath?
faq.a: Stays in Shiv Mandir, Ambarnath start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shiv Mandir, Ambarnath?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ambarnath, Ulhasnagar, Vithalwadi, Nandiwali Tarf Pachanand, Kalyan Airstrip.
